calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Modivication And Termination Of The Robert Thralls Hayn Intervivos Trust Based On Changed Circumstances Not Anticipated By The Trustor; Points And Authorities In Support Of The Petition; Declarations Of Robert M. Brown And Norman Lynde
Off Calendar Aug-20-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Melbostad appeared by zoom for and with Robert Brown by zoom.

Mr. Melbostad stated that he has not heard of any objections and that the two contingent beneficiaries signed a declaration in support of the petition. The Amended Petition for Modification and Termination of The Robert Thralls Hayn Intervivos Trust, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K, Magdaleno. Not reported.

Petition For Approval Of Modivication And Termination Of The Robert Thralls Hayn Intervivos Trust Based On Changed Circumstances Not Anticipated By
